scenarios.title: Erase GUI-CLAW and Windows
scenarios.description: Use the eraser tool in Goodnotes on iPad to remove the texts "GUI-CLAW" and "Windows" from the current page.

scenarios.title: Save Shenzhen Ten Peaks to Notes
scenarios.description: Research Shenzhen Ten Peaks, summarize the beginner-friendly option closest to Futian District, and save the findings into iPad Notes.
